examples: He has devised a process for making gold wires which neither corrode nor oxidize.
Too much oxygen would oxidize the iron, a reaction we don't want.
Some types of die buildup oxidize quickly and turn brown or black.
Upon exposure to water and oxygen, these minerals oxidize to form acid-, iron- and sulfate-rich drainage.
Most rock being mined has abundant iron sulfide minerals which oxidize when exposed to air and water.
